name: him-chat
description: Built-in HIM chat participant with comprehensive model support: OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, MiniMax, SiliconFlow, DeepSeek, Qwen, Moonshot, Zhipu AI, Groq, Ollama, Cohere, Mistral AI, and Azure OpenAI.

chatParticipants.name: him
chatParticipants.description: Talk to your configured model provider (OpenAI / Claude / Gemini / Minimax).

himCode.chat.provider.markdownDescription: Upstream provider used by HIM Chat.

himCode.chat.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for the selected provider. If empty, HIM Chat also checks provider env vars (`OPENAI_API_KEY`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `GEMINI_API_KEY`, `GOOGLE_API_KEY`, `MINIMAX_API_KEY`).

himCode.chat.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Optional base URL override. Leave empty to use provider defaults.

himCode.chat.model.markdownDescription: Model name override. Leave empty to use provider defaults.

himCode.chat.customModels.markdownDescription: Custom model endpoints for free-form providers. Each item supports `baseUrl`, `model`, and `apiKey`.

himCode.chat.systemPrompt.default: You are HIM Code AI assistant. Be concise, accurate, and practical for software engineering.
himCode.chat.systemPrompt.markdownDescription: System prompt prepended to each request. See: extensions/him-chat/prompts/system-prompt.md

himCode.chat.historyTurns.markdownDescription: How many previous turns to include in provider requests.

himCode.chat.semanticProgramMode.markdownDescription: When enabled, the model first outputs a `<him-semantic-program>` JSON; the IDE runs compiler audit and executes one semantic step per round.

himCode.chat.semanticProgramDebug.markdownDescription: When enabled, assistant messages from semantic program mode include a **Debug** card with provider inputs/outputs per phase (Author, Compiler, Codegen). May contain long prompts and API keys in system text — turn off before sharing screenshots.

himCode.chat.maxPlanSteps.markdownDescription: Safety cap on semantic program chain length (steps) per send.

himCode.chat.requestPath.markdownDescription: Request path used for `openai`, `minimax`, and `openaiCompatible` providers.

himCode.chat.shellOutputMaxLines.markdownDescription: Max lines kept for each shell output (tail).

himCode.chat.shellHeredocFastPath.markdownDescription: Fast-path large heredoc writes in <him-shell> to avoid terminal timeouts/encoding issues.

himCode.chat.search.defaultProvider.markdownDescription: Default provider for <him-search>. 'auto' picks whitelist for code/engineering questions and open-web for general web tasks.

himCode.chat.search.askToBroaden.markdownDescription: If whitelist returns no results, ask user whether to broaden search scope (e.g. Google CSE).

himCode.chat.search.maxOutputLines.markdownDescription: Max lines shown inside one search result block (head).

himCode.chat.googleCseApiKey.markdownDescription: Google Custom Search API key used when provider is 'google'.

himCode.chat.googleCseCx.markdownDescription: Google Custom Search Engine CX used with Google CSE search.

himCode.chat.voiceTranscriptionUrl.markdownDescription: Full URL for **OpenAI-compatible** speech-to-text (HTTP POST, `multipart/form-data` with fields `file` + `model`). Example: `https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/transcriptions`. Required for microphone input.

himCode.chat.voiceTranscriptionApiKey.markdownDescription: API key sent as `Authorization: Bearer …` for **HIM CODE** voice transcription. Prefer a key scoped to transcription only.

himCode.chat.voiceTranscriptionModel.markdownDescription: Model name sent as form field `model` (e.g. `whisper-1` for OpenAI).

himCode.chat.voiceTranscriptionLanguage.markdownDescription: Optional ISO-639-1 language code (form field `language`), e.g. `zh`. Empty: provider auto-detect.
